key_evidence: orderflow/services/inventory.py:list_low_stock — the rewrite drops the documented ascending-by-shortage sort (the items.sort(...) line and the ordering clause in the docstring are gone), returning items in repository scan order; orderflow/api/handlers.py:restock_priorities (another package) still slices the tail assuming most-urgent-last, so it now surfaces the least-urgent SKU as most urgent. tests/test_handlers.py masks it by monkeypatching inventory.list_low_stock to return a hardcoded ordered list.
